wordplay_note: The faithful dog who bites his master's hand
card_description: Chien (Tung) (meaning "Chien = dog (Chinese)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Faith of Our Fathers*. Party functionary in Hanoi who accidentally sees through the regime's hallucinogenic control. Name note: The faithful dog who bites his master's hand. The loyal subject who glimpses the cosmic horror behind ideology. First appears in *Faith of Our Fathers*.

reference.brief: Party functionary in Hanoi who accidentally sees through the regime's hallucinogenic control
reference.significance: The loyal subject who glimpses the cosmic horror behind ideology
